{{Quote|They are afraid, Supreme Chancellor|Uv Gizen|<ref name="Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (novelization)">[[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'' novelization]]</ref>}}
'''Uv Gizen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as an [[Aide/Legends|aide]] of [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. Shortly before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], Uv believed that the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] were afraid since many protests were pushed forward.

==Behind the scenes==
Uv Gizen is the name given in the script of [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']] for the character that became [[Sly Moore/Legends|Sly Moore]].
